title: Ainiv 2-Packs 8pcs Small Hooks with Adhesive Strips(Damage-Free Remove), Multi-Function Self Adhesive Hooks, Wall Door Hooks for Bathroom Kitchen Hanging Bag Coat Cloth Flowerpot, Holds up to 0.8kg
features: 【VERSATILE UTILITY HOOK】Our wall hook is widely used on hard and smooth surfaces, such as glass, tile, Finished wood, mental, polished marble and plastic etc. It is very suitable for hanging various items in kitchens, dormitories, offices and outdoors. (Not including bathrooms or wet environments)

【NO TOOLS REQUIRED】These sticky hooks do not require nails or hammers, so you can say goodbye to holes. It can be easily attached to where you need it, allowing you to easily organize your various kitchen utensils, clothes, hats, backpacks, office supplies and home decorations, etc., and keep your home or dorm tidy.

【DAMAGE-FREE & REMOVES CLEANLY】Our multi-functional adhesive hook can be firmly adhered to where you need it, but can also be easily removed without leaving any marks or sticky residue, keeping your walls, doors, cabinets, or closets etc. beautiful.

【EASY TO USE】No complicated steps, no tools required, our hanging hook is equipped with a strong tape on the back, which can be seamlessly integrated with the contact surface and firmly adhered. Small and portable, you can carry it and stick it anywhere you need.

【STRONG AND DURABLE】This wall hanger is made of high-quality PVC material, and the tape on the back has super strong adhesion, which is srong and durable. In the maximum load-bearing range within 1.8LB/0.8KG, there is no need to worry about the hook falling off or breaking. (Please make sure the load-bearing range meets your needs before purchasing).
description: Product Description Hooks with Adhesive Strips are Strong Adhesive，simple and quick install, easy to remove without damaging the wall Ainiv Hook The hooks are made of high-quality PVC material, which is versatile and can be used on painted walls, wood, glass, tiles, metal. Great for hanging backpacks, clothing and furniture accents. Easy to install: 1. Please choose a smooth and hard wall surface, such as tile, wood, metal, glass, mirror, acrylic, plastic, etc. 2. Remove the protective film, stick one side to the hook and the other side to the wall. Do not touch the paste surface with your hands. 3. Press firmly when pasting the item to ensure a good paste. 4. Do not put anything on the item after sticking it, it can be used normally after 24 hours. Good for removing: 1. Fix the hook by hand. 2. Pull sticky strip straight down to remove the hook. 3. Do not pull strip towards you to avoid loss of the wall Attention: -Suitable for places with smooth and hard surfaces, such as wood, metal, glass, mirror, marble, plastic, etc. -Not suitable for painted walls, bricks,fabic, drywall and rough surfaces. -Please keep the surface clean and dry before sticking the hook. -Do not hang overweight, expensive or fragile products. -When disassembling, first use a hair dryer to heat the melted glue, then the nail-free wall mount can be easily disassembled. 4pcs Large Hooks 6pcs Medium Hooks 8pcs Small Hooks Hooks Mini with Adhesive Strips Adhesive Picture Hanging Strips Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,062 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,062 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,062 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,062 4.2 out of 5 stars 3,171 Price £6.39 £ 6 . 39 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — no data £7.99 £ 7 . 99 Material Plastic PVC Plastic PVC Plastic PVC Plastic ‎Polyvinyl Chloride Colour white-4pcs white-6pcs white-8pcs transparent-40pcs white-8/15/32/64 pairs Finish type Smooth Smooth Smooth Smooth Smooth Load capacity 5.5LB/2.5KG 3.3LB/1.5KG 1.8LB/0.8KG no data no data
